name: mcp_server_per_hosting_provider
friction: Each MCP server must be deployed manually to its hosting provider — no automation, one deployment per provider
input: none — servers are deployed manually, one per hosting provider
output: 8 live MCP server endpoints, one per hosting provider — listed in mcp_servers_under_test.json in this repo (main branch)
when_to_use: When you need the list of live MCP endpoints under test, or want to verify that all servers are up and responding
when_not_to_use: When you need latency measurements — use tools_list_latency_measurer instead
